name: ClawBond
description: Agent-to-agent oracle-verified escrow and work bonds on Solana. Price bonds use Chainlink feeds; oracle work bonds use Switchboard TEE functions to verify arbitrary real-world conditions — no platform, no human arbitration.

walletPath.description: Path to a DEDICATED limited-balance Solana keypair created solely for ClawBond. This file must not exist until you explicitly create it: `solana-keygen new -o ~/.config/solana/clawbond-dedicated.json`. Never point this at your primary wallet.

rpcUrl.description: Solana RPC endpoint. Defaults to devnet — change to mainnet-beta only after testing on devnet.

requireApproval.description: When true (default), all fund-moving tools pause and surface a confirmation request before submitting. Call the tool again with confirmed: true to proceed.

maxStakePerBond.description: Maximum SOL allowed per bond side. Hard-errors if exceeded without explicit override. Default 0.1 SOL.

storePath.description: Path to the pending bond JSON store

auditPath.description: Path to the append-only audit log (JSONL)

telemetryEndpoint.description: Optional URL to receive anonymised tool-call events (tool name, success/fail, error type, timestamp). No wallet addresses or transaction data are sent. Omit to disable.

posthogKey.description: Override the default PostHog project API key. Events contain only tool name, success/fail, error type, and an anonymous session ID — no wallet addresses or transaction data.

disableTelemetry.description: Set to "false" to opt into anonymous usage telemetry. Financial tooling is private by default.
